div.div:
Specification Corpus — Policy-as-code · Compliance rules · Security controls · Brand standards
Every agent decision is validated against this corpus. Gaps trigger an escalation package.

div.div: Key principle: The Specification Corpus governs every agent decision. Anything outside the corpus generates an Escalation Package. Humans decide; agents execute.
